revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月廿二]][[zh:正月廿二]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 22|qq=January 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 22''' is the 22nd day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daiji (era)|en|Daiji (era)|qid=Q1037046|lt=Daiji (era)|1=Daiji (era)}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} 15 February 1126) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenji (era)|en|Tenji (era)|qid=Q1150846|lt=Tenji (era)|1=Tenji (era)}} to Daiji due to an outbreak of {{ill|Smallpox|en|Smallpox|qid=Q12214|lt=smallpox|1=Smallpox}}.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03}}
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 22 (Julian calendar 4 February 1553) – {{ill|Mōri Terumoto|en|Mōri Terumoto|qid=Q1142657|lt=Mōri Terumoto|1=Mōri Terumoto}}{{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=83}}, {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|qid=Q61982|lt=daimyō|1=Daimyo}} (d. 1625) * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 4 March 1793) – {{ill|Ōshio Heihachirō|en|Ōshio Heihachirō|qid=Q1056715|lt=Ōshio Heihachirō|1=Ōshio Heihachirō}}, scholar of {{ill|Yangmingism|en|Yangmingism|qid=Q697205|lt=Yangmingism|1=Yangmingism}} and {{ill|Yoriki|en|Yoriki|qid=Q3108649|lt=yoriki|1=Yoriki}} of the Osaka machi-bugyō (d. 1837)
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 14 (Gregorian calendar 16 February 1637) – {{ill|Lady Acha|en|Lady Acha|qid=Q10564976|lt=Lady Acha|1=Lady Acha}}, concubine of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (b. 1554)
== Holidays and observances ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|29|2|1|12|30|2|1|0130|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:一月廿二]]
{{translated page|ja|1月22日 (旧暦)|version=82302684|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:1 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:January 22 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 1월 22일]] [[ja:1月22日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月廿二]]
[[ar:January 22 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- Note: "徳川家斉" is recorded as "閏1月7日" in another source. --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月廿二]] {{wikidata link|Q839169}} [[Category:Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 22 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
